# WASP-39b west limb (morning terminator) transit spectrum
# Source: obs_data/WASP_39b_east_west.txt
# Format: wavelength_um half_bin_width_um transit_depth uncertainty response_mode
# Notes:
# - Original depths/errors were provided in ppm and are converted here to fractional depth.
# - Bin half-widths are estimated from adjacent wavelength-bin centers.
# - The source-file covariance column is not used in the current retrieval input format.
